_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

basicInfo.description: Patient-derived cNF organoid from 31-year-old male NF1 patient; established from scalp/head and neck/anterior trunk/abdomen cNF by collagenase IV dissociation and reconstitution in Mammocult:Matrigel (3:4) ring format
basicInfo.clinicalData: Age at surgery: 31; Sex: Male; cNF location: scalp, head and neck, anterior trunk, abdomen; Single tumors: 8; Pooled tumors: 4; NF1 germline variant: not reported
validationMethods: IHC (S100, CD34, CD56, CD117/c-Kit, NGFR, SOX2, SOX10, PanCytokeratin)
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Orthopaedic Surgery, David Geffen School of Medicine, UCLA
